====Traded to the player====
Upon the third unique interaction with Rika in the League Club Room, she will trade the Paldean [[regional form]] of Wooper to the player in exchange for almost any Pokémon excluding {{Shiny}}, {{pkmn2|Legendary}}, or [[Mythical Pokémon]].
